posts.label: Meme 1
posts.overlay_text: me trying to follow his texts
posts.fb_caption: Reading his texts like it's a final exam I didn't study for 😂 The 'k', the one-word replies, the vanishing act… Tag someone who has to help you decode them. What's the most confusing text you've ever had to decipher?

posts.label: Meme 2
posts.overlay_text: me realizing i deserve so much more
posts.fb_caption: Journaling really said 'let me show you who you actually are.' 💜 Has writing ever helped you realize something major about yourself? Drop it below — we love a good glow-up story.

posts.label: Quote 1
posts.quote: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
posts.fb_caption: Sometimes we look everywhere for answers — until we realize the deepest ones live inside us. ✨ Save this if you need a gentle reminder to slow down and turn inward. Who would you share this with today?

posts.label: Quote 2
posts.quote: Your heart knows the way. Run in that direction.
posts.fb_caption: Rumi had a way of saying in one sentence what takes us years to figure out. 💜 Are you listening to your heart right now, or overthinking it? Share this with someone who needs the nudge.

posts.ig_caption: Journaling has the power to transform your relationships — starting with the one you have with yourself. 💜 Check this out if you've been thinking about picking up the pen.
